title: Jazz At St Andrews Hove Celebrating Miles Davis Centenary
description: Join us for early evening live jazz each Friday as we celebrate the centenary of the iconic Miles Davis. Each week join your host and trumpeter, Chris Coull plus amazing bands featuring some of the top names on the British Jazz Scene. May 8th IMOGEN RYALL SINGS ’PORGY AND BESS’ Gershwin’s opera comes to life, in a thrilling jazz suite for the 21st century. May 15th KIND OF BLUE featuring TERRY SEABROOK, JOSEPHINE DAVIES & ANDY PANAYI The most widely sold, famous jazz album in history-played live from a six piece all star band. May 22nd CLAIRE MARTIN QUARTET Celebrated as the UK’s foremost jazz vocalist - with Rob Barron (p), Jeremy Brown (b), Mark Taylor.(d) May 29th ART THEMEN AND DAVE NEWTON Two of Britain’s finest jazz musicians and band in an evening celebrating Miles’ “First Great Quintet" and other jazz standards.
